meaning: [气]中气旋(指直径16公里以下的旋风)
examples: At maturity stage, the sustaining mesocyclone is the most important characteristic.
The analyzed low-pressure center at the surface was located ~8 km east of the mesocyclone.
The second one was produced by a mesocyclone , which developed along the shear line, and the strong convergence.
When the updrafts are strong and the wind shear large, the spin inside the mesocyclone becomes very fast.
It is this updraft spin, or mesocyclone, that creates the tornado.
